hero.description: The public app is intentionally locked while QuizMate AI prepares a controlled release for teachers, schools, and academic teams. We are opening with a smaller first cohort to tune quiz generation, secure assessment flows, and study support before wider traffic.
hero.blockedUntil: Public login, home, workspace, and quiz routes stay blocked until {{date}}.

focus.label: Focus
focus.title: AI Quiz
focus.description: Source to assessment in a tighter, cleaner workflow.

security.label: Security
security.title: Exam Flow
security.description: Restricted while protected assessment behavior is tuned.

support.label: Support
support.title: Notes + Roadmaps
support.description: Revision tools stay aligned with each generated quiz.

console.label: Launch Console
console.title: QuizMate AI Command Center
console.modeDescription: Public-facing routes are intentionally redirected into launch mode.
console.cohortDescription: Early access goes to users who can validate assessment, revision, and analytics flows.

quizStudio.title: AI Quiz Studio
quizStudio.description: Generate structured assessments from lessons, slides, and PDFs.

secureExamRoom.title: Secure Exam Room
secureExamRoom.description: Focused test experience with stricter control before public traffic.

learningRoadmaps.title: Learning Roadmaps
learningRoadmaps.description: Connect quizzes, study notes, and revision paths into one flow.

reasonsSection.title: Launch with control, not with noise

qualityFirst.title: Quality First
qualityFirst.description: The first cohort stays small so quiz generation, scoring logic, and study flows can be tuned with real educator feedback.

saferRollout.title: Safer Rollout
saferRollout.description: Access is restricted while exam security, navigation guardrails, and account flows are hardened before public release.

directFeedbackLoop.title: Direct Feedback Loop
directFeedbackLoop.description: Early users influence what ships first, from AI quiz outputs to revision notes and analytics priorities.

releaseSection.title: What opens when QuizMate AI goes live

assessmentBuilder.title: Assessment Builder
assessmentBuilder.description: AI quiz creation, question banks, and multi-format source intake.

examSecurity.title: Exam Security
examSecurity.description: Protected assessment mode for timed evaluation flows.

progressAnalytics.title: Progress Analytics
progressAnalytics.description: Performance signals for teachers, learners, and teams.

studyCompanion.title: Study Companion
studyCompanion.description: Roadmaps, notes, and smarter revision support around every quiz.

earlyAccess.title: Register before the public launch opens
earlyAccess.description: Join the first rollout to test QuizMate AI earlier, share feedback on assessment quality, and help shape the release priorities for schools, universities, and teaching teams.

footer.restricted: Launch mode is active. All application routes remain restricted.
